name: English Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the angel cake into medium-sized pieces.
2. Spread each piece with a small amount of raspberry jam.
3. Arrange the pieces in a straight-sided glass bowl.
4. Pour over the sherry and lightly weight down with a saucer.
5. Cover with plastic wrap and set aside for a few hours, or overnight until the sherry is absorbed.
6. Mix Jello according to directions, without ice.
7. Pour the Jello over the cake and sherry in the bowl.
8. Cover and refrigerate for several hours or overnight until the Jello is set.
9. Before serving, prepare the Vanilla Pudding mix and pour over the top of the Jello.
10. Use a knife to slide the pudding down the sides of the bowl.
11. Cover and chill again.
12. Garnish with cherries and mint, or use candied holiday fruits to decorate the top of the bowl.
13. When serving, slide a spoon to the bottom of the bowl for each serving to ensure all layers and flavors are included.
14. If not watching sugar content or calories, regular jam, Jello, and pudding mix can be used instead. This recipe looks best in a straight-sided glass bowl and has been a family favorite since childhood.
